response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 25+ years of industry experience and staff-level technical leadership, currently working on GenAI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, falls short of the minimum 8+ years of production AI systems experience (appears to be ~6 years), and lacks demonstrated expertise in critical technical areas including vector databases, RAG architectures, and multi-agent frameworks. Python is not listed despite being a required language. Would be a promising growth hire but does not currently meet the core experience threshold.
strengths: Staff-level engineer with extensive full-stack experience across infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes), and TypeScript; demonstrates technical leadership capability.
Currently active in GenAI space at re:cinq working directly with MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflows—a key required technology.
Proven ability to design and build complex systems at scale (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby; event-driven geo-data platform) with strong DevOps and CI/CD fundamentals.
concerns: Python is not listed in skills despite being one of two primary required languages; TypeScript is strong but incomplete language coverage.
No demonstrated experience with vector databases or RAG architectures—both listed as core technical requirements for the role.
GenAI/AI background is recent (6 years at current role); does not meet the stated minimum of 8+ years building and shipping production-grade AI solutions.

key_factors.factor: Missing Vector DB & RAG Technical Depth
